title: Colby
description: A texture pack to improve overall pvp experience
body:
# Colby

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth lin

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62a84f92172ec4743203b6c509b11502d58c8717.gif)
Elevate your PvP experience with Colby, a meticulously designed Minecraft 1.21+ PvP texture pack engineered for enhanced visibility, smoother combat, and peak performance. Featuring better item models, custom low-fire effects, this pack is crafted to give you the best pvp experience in every battle.Designed for competitive PvPers, UHC players, and fast-paced duels, Colby ensures maximum clarity and fluidity, so you can react faster and hit harder.



Smaller Hand Held Items, Smaller Particles,
Totem, Totem Pop,
Golden apples/e-gaps,
Lava, Water, Cobwebs,
Low Shield, Low Fire,
Ore outline, End crystals
and many more!


A PVP focused texture pack with stunning smoother textures to ensure maximum vision, peak performance and the best experience while in combat
